# Filament Blog

## Documentation Sets

- [Filament Blog](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/llms-full.txt)

## Landing

- [Filament Blog - Headless Blog Package](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog): Headless-by-default blog package for Filament. Opt-in public routes, tags taxonomy, MediaLibrary integration, MCP tools, and SEO components — your app stays in control.

## Docs

- [Installation](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/getting-started/installation): Install Filament Blog in your Laravel application.
- [Frontend Setup (headless)](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/getting-started/frontend-setup): Build your own blog frontend using the package's Blade components.
- [Public-routes mode](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/getting-started/public-routes-mode): Get a working blog at /blog without writing controllers — opt in via config flags.
- [Blade Components](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/essentials/blade-components): All available Blade components for building your blog frontend.
- [Filament Admin](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/essentials/filament-admin): Managing blog posts, categories, and tags in the Filament admin panel.
- [MCP Tools](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/essentials/mcp-tools): 13 MCP tools for AI agent blog management.
- [Configuration](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/essentials/configuration): Full configuration reference for Filament Blog.
- [Tags Taxonomy](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/essentials/tags): Opt-in many-to-many tags taxonomy with admin UI and public archive.
- [MediaLibrary Integration](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/essentials/media-library): Opt-in featured-image upload via spatie/laravel-medialibrary.
- [Contributing](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/community/contributing): How to contribute to Filament Blog.
- [License](https://manukminasyan.github.io/filament-blog/community/license): License information.
